case_title: CAIHONG CERNICK VS. HAIGANG GROUP INC. et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT HAIGANG GROUP INC. D.B.A. CA TECHNOLOGY UNIVERSITY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-08-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-08-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY EDWARD CHU--MANDARIN INTERPRETER. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY MAN TANG--MANDARIN INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,000.00 FILED BY CERNICK, CAIHONG AS TO DEFENDANT HAIGANG GROUP INC. D.B.A. CA TECHNOLOGY UNIVERSITY TONG, FRANK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-08-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE BY THE SHERIFF DEPT., "UNABLE TO DELIVER DOCUMENT AT THE LOCATION. MUST SERVE REGISTERED AGENT LISTED WITH SECRETARY OF STATE." (SERVICE FEE $35.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CERNICK, CAIHONG AS TO DEFENDANT HAIGANG GROUP INC. D.B.A. CA TECHNOLOGY UNIVERSITY
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$35.00)NOT SERVED. MULTIPLE ATTEMPTS MADE ON VARIOUS DATES. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CERNICK, CAIHONG AS TO DEFENDANT TONG, FRANK

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CERNICK, CAIHONG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAIGANG GROUP INC. D.B.A. CA TECHNOLOGY UNIVERSITY TONG, FRANK $2,450.00 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,595.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
